leiheng:shoot1.NAME: Double Shot
leiheng:shoot1.DESCRIPTION: Attack the enemy 2 times, dealing !D! damage each. Consume 1 stack of leiheng:Tigermark , deal 2 additional damage and apply !M! stacks of leiheng:Burn .
leiheng:shoot1.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Attack the enemy 2 times, dealing !D! damage each. Consume 1 stack of leiheng:Tigermark , deal 3 additional damage and apply !M! stacks of leiheng:Burn .

leiheng:shoot2.NAME: Triple Shot
leiheng:shoot2.DESCRIPTION: Attack the enemy 3 times, dealing !D! damage each. Consume 2 stacks of leiheng:Tigermark , apply !M! stacks of leiheng:Burn 3 times, deal 2 additional damage and apply 2 stacks of leiheng:Burn for each Tigermark consumed.
leiheng:shoot2.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Attack the enemy 3 times, dealing !D! damage each. Consume 2 stacks of leiheng:Tigermark , apply !M! stacks of leiheng:Burn 3 times, deal 4 additional damage and apply 2 stacks of leiheng:Burn for each Tigermark consumed.

leiheng:HeavyStrike.NAME: Heavy Strike
leiheng:HeavyStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies and give them -3 Strength. Apply !M! stacks of leiheng:Burn , consume up to 2 stacks of leiheng:Tigermark , deal 2 additional damage and apply 2 stacks of leiheng:Burn for each Tigermark consumed.
leiheng:HeavyStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies and give them -3 Strength. Apply !M! stacks of leiheng:Burn , consume up to 2 stacks of leiheng:Tigermark , deal 4 additional damage and apply 4 stacks of leiheng:Burn for each Tigermark consumed.

leiheng:QuickStrike.NAME: Tanglecleaver
leiheng:QuickStrike.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust . Deal !D! damage to all enemies 3 times. Each time has !M!% chance to increase damage by 6. Consume all leiheng:Tigermark , apply the same number of stacks of leiheng:Burn to all enemies. Reset leiheng:Tigermark to 8, gain 2 Weak, and obtain one *Savage *Tigerslayer's *Perfected *Flurry *of *Blades. NL End your turn
leiheng:QuickStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Exhaust . Deal !D! damage to all enemies 3 times. Each time has !M!% chance to increase damage by 6. Consume all leiheng:Tigermark , apply the same number of stacks of leiheng:Burn to all enemies. Reset leiheng:Tigermark to 8, gain 2 Weak, and obtain one *Savage *Tigerslayer's *Perfected *Flurry *of *Blades. NL End your turn

leiheng:Defendx3.NAME: Defensive Stance
leiheng:Defendx3.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block, 3 times in a row.
leiheng:Defendx3.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block, 3 times in a row.

leiheng:Longtenghuyue.NAME: Dragon Tiger Leap
leiheng:Longtenghuyue.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards, consume 1 stack of leiheng:Tigermark , repeat once
leiheng:Longtenghuyue.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards, consume 1 stack of leiheng:Tigermark , repeat once

leiheng:BulletDraw.NAME: Bullet Draw
leiheng:BulletDraw.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you consume a bullet, draw !M! cards.
leiheng:BulletDraw.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you consume a bullet, draw !M! cards.

leiheng:ReloadStrike.NAME: Tiantui Star Blade: Reload
leiheng:ReloadStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, reset leiheng:Tigermark to 8, end your turn. NL Exhaust
leiheng:ReloadStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, reset leiheng:Tigermark to 8, end your turn. NL Exhaust

leiheng:Reloading.NAME: Quick Reload
leiheng:Reloading.DESCRIPTION: At the start of each turn, gain !M! stacks of leiheng:Tigermark .
leiheng:Reloading.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of each turn, gain !M! stacks of leiheng:Tigermark .

leiheng:FanTheFlames.NAME: Fan the Flames
leiheng:FanTheFlames.DESCRIPTION: Double the stacks of leiheng:Burn on all enemies. NL Exhaust
leiheng:FanTheFlames.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Double the stacks of leiheng:Burn on all enemies.

leiheng:BulletDefense.NAME: Bullet Defense
leiheng:BulletDefense.DESCRIPTION: Gain 2 stacks of Bullet Barrage Defense. Whenever you consume a bullet, gain block equal to the number of Bullet Barrage Defense stacks.
leiheng:BulletDefense.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain 2 stacks of Bullet Barrage Defense. Whenever you consume a bullet, gain block equal to the number of Bullet Barrage Defense stacks.

leiheng:Ignite.NAME: Ignite
leiheng:Ignite.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, deal 1 additional damage for every 2 stacks of Burn.
leiheng:Ignite.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, deal 1 additional damage for every 2 stacks of Burn.

leiheng:ArmorPiercingShot.NAME: Armor Piercing Shot
leiheng:ArmorPiercingShot.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, consume 1 leiheng:Tigermark , give the enemy !M! Weak and !M! Vulnerable.
leiheng:ArmorPiercingShot.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, consume 1 leiheng:Tigermark , give the enemy !M! Weak and !M! Vulnerable.

leiheng:ShieldWall.NAME: Shield Wall
leiheng:ShieldWall.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. Consume 1 leiheng:Tigermark , gain additional !M! block.
leiheng:ShieldWall.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. Consume 1 leiheng:Tigermark , gain additional !M! block.

leiheng:RapidFire.NAME: Rapid Fire
leiheng:RapidFire.DESCRIPTION: Consume up to 6 Tigermark, then lose all Tigermark. Whenever you consume 1 Tigermark, randomly deal !D! damage to an enemy and apply !M! stacks of Burn.
leiheng:RapidFire.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Consume up to 6 Tigermark, then lose all Tigermark. Whenever you consume 1 Tigermark, randomly deal !D! damage to an enemy and apply !M! stacks of Burn.

leiheng:BattleFrenzy.NAME: Battle Frenzy
leiheng:BattleFrenzy.DESCRIPTION: Gain 2 Strength, apply !M! Weak to all enemies.
leiheng:BattleFrenzy.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain 3 Strength, apply !M! Weak to all enemies.

leiheng:SuperTigerStrike.NAME: Savage Tigerslayer's Perfected Flurry of Blades
leiheng:SuperTigerStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies 6 times. Each time has !M!% chance to increase damage by 6. Consume all leiheng:Tigermark , apply the same number of stacks of leiheng:Burn to all enemies. Reset leiheng:Tigermark to 8, end your turn.
leiheng:SuperTigerStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies 6 times. Each time has !M!% chance to increase damage by 6. Consume all leiheng:Tigermark , apply the same number of stacks of leiheng:Burn to all enemies. Reset leiheng:Tigermark to 8, end your turn.
